name: What exactly happens during the storm damage restoration process?

mainEntity.name: What exactly happens during the storm damage restoration process?

acceptedAnswer.text: The restoration process typically includes damage assessment, emergency protection measures like tarping, water extraction, structural drying with dehumidifiers, moisture monitoring, antimicrobial treatment to prevent mold, content restoration, and finally reconstruction of damaged materials. This multi-stage approach ensures your property is brought back to its pre-damage condition safely and thoroughly.
acceptedAnswer.description: Assessment, emergency protection, water extraction, structural drying, mold prevention, content cleaning, and reconstruction.

description: Assessment, emergency protection, water extraction, structural drying, mold prevention, content cleaning, and reconstruction.
